description:
Create a Synchronization-Continuation tapping experiment in PsychoPy Builder to measure motor timing stability. Participants tap along with a metronome and then continue at the same pace after the sound stops.

The experiment must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/sync_continuation.psyexp and utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/conditions.csv containing an 'ioi' column with values 0.4 and 0.6. The experiment structure requires an outer loop named 'blocks' and a Synchronization routine nested within an inner loop named 'pacing' (10 repetitions). The Synchronization routine should include a fixation cross and a 440Hz, 0.05s sound with timing controlled by the 'ioi' variable. The Continuation routine must display a visual cue for at least 10 seconds and record all key presses. The final experiment must be capable of generating a valid Python script.
